title: Mexican Bus Ride
writer: Manuel Altolaguirre, Luis Buñuel, Juan de la Cabada
actors: Lilia Prado, Carmelita González, Esteban Mayo
plot: A newly-wed country boy receives the terrible news that his mother is dying, and takes a long and dangerous bus trip to the city to contact a notary for her last will and testament. Will he resist temptation and do the right thing?
